---
title: "Projects"
sidebar: false
---

# Projects

Below are some of the projects and areas I am currently interested in.

## mpci: Python Package for Multivariate Process Capability Indices

This project focuses on developing an open-source Python package for computing Multivariate Process Capability Indices. The goal is to provide a modular and reliable implementation for researchers and practitioners working on multivariate quality control problems.

## AI-Powered Personalized Leadership Development System

This senior design project investigates how analytics, stochastic modeling, and optimization can be combined to support personalized leadership development through data-driven recommendations.
